---
title: "overwatch.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\overwatch.py"
loc: 153
complexity: 27
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 5.58
overall_score: 2.20
---

## Intent
The `overwatch.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on StatsCollector, __init__, collect, get_stats, OverwatchRenderer, __init__, render_header, render_heatmap, _color_cell, render_pulse_logs, update_latency, InputManager, poll, Overwatch, __init__, run, _handle_input, _check_delta, _measure_latency, _update_heatmap, _get_latest_pulses. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via StatsCollector, __init__, collect, get_stats, OverwatchRenderer, __init__, render_header, render_heatmap, _color_cell, render_pulse_logs, update_latency, InputManager, poll, Overwatch, __init__, run, _handle_input, _check_delta, _measure_latency, _update_heatmap, _get_latest_pulses. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 25 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [msvcrt](file://msvcrt)
- [os](file://os)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [security_scan](file://security_scan)

### Exports
- `StatsCollector`
- `__init__`
- `collect`
- `get_stats`
- `OverwatchRenderer`
- `__init__`
- `render_header`
- `render_heatmap`
- `_color_cell`
- `render_pulse_logs`
- `update_latency`
- `InputManager`
- `poll`
- `Overwatch`
- `__init__`
- `run`
- `_handle_input`
- `_check_delta`
- `_measure_latency`
- `_update_heatmap`
- `_get_latest_pulses`
